designConstraints: Single-column focused layout with max content width of 1280px, centered with 24px horizontal margins following the 12-column grid system
8px spacing unit system — all padding, margin, and gap values must be multiples of 4px or 8px from the scale [4, 8, 12, 16, 24, 32, 48, 64]
Background uses deep-navy (#0F172A) as background-primary; form sections use navy-surface (#1E293B) as surface-primary cards with elevation level 1 shadow (0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.3))
AmountHeroInput must use heading-1 typography scale (DM Sans, 24px, weight 700) at minimum, scaled up for hero display prominence — large numeric display is a primary visual anchor
CategoryChipGrid and PaymentMethodChipRow chips must use pill border-radius (9999px) with minimum touch target of 44x44px
Selected chip state uses gold-amber (#F59E0B) border and background tint; unselected chips use slate-border (#334155) border on navy-raised (#293548) surface
SaveExpenseButton must be full-width, minimum 44px height, using cta-primary (gold-amber #F59E0B) background with text-on-cta (deep-navy #0F172A) text — DM Sans font
MiniCalendarDropdown and SettingsDialog overlays use z-index 1000 (dropdown) and 1200 (modal) respectively with overlay color rgba(0,0,0,0.65)
NewCategoryInlineForm and ColorPickerRow expand inline within the CategoryChipGrid section — no modal required; uses navy-raised (#293548) surface with medium border-radius (10px)
Focus states use gold-amber (#F59E0B) focus ring, 2px width, 2px offset on all interactive elements
Disabled state opacity is 0.38 for SaveExpenseButton when form is incomplete
Motion: form field transitions use fast duration (150ms) with default easing cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); QuickAddChip auto-fill uses normal duration (300ms)
TopBar and NavigationTabs are shared components — must match exact implementation from dashboard and spending-insights pages
Desktop-first layout at 1440px viewport; tablet breakpoint at 768px collapses chip grids to wrapping rows
Maximum 3 levels of visual hierarchy: TopBar (level 1), AmountHeroInput hero section (level 2), form field sections as cards (level 3)
CharacterCounter for NoteInput displays remaining characters using label typography (DM Mono, 12px) in muted-text (#64748B), turning coral-error (#F87171) at limit
QuickAddSuggestions section appears above the AmountHeroInput or as a horizontal scroll row — chips use QuickAddChip pattern with emoji, merchant name, and amount
DatePickerInput displays selected date in body typography (DM Mono, 14px); MiniCalendarDropdown uses elevation level 2 (0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.4)) and z-index 1000
NoteInput uses surface-input (deep-navy #0F172A) background with slate-border (#334155) default border, gold-amber border on focus, coral-error border on validation error
Edit mode pre-fill: all form fields populate from Expense entity data when navigated from dashboard Edit action — TopBar back arrow and title reflect edit context
referencePatterns: Hero input pattern — oversized numeric display as primary focal point, consistent with premium fintech dashboard aesthetic using DM Sans display font
Chip grid selection pattern — pill-shaped chips with active/inactive states using gold-amber accent for selection, matching CategoryFilterDropdown pattern from dashboard
Inline form expansion pattern — NewCategoryInlineForm and ColorPickerRow expand in-place within the chip grid without navigation, using navy-raised surface
Quick Add suggestion chip pattern — horizontal scrollable row of pre-filled action chips with emoji, merchant, and amount metadata for one-tap form population
Full-width CTA button pattern — SaveExpenseButton spans full content width at bottom of form, gold-amber fill with deep-navy text, consistent with EmptyState CTA on dashboard
Card-based form section grouping — each logical form section (amount, category, date, payment, note) wrapped in navy-surface card with elevation level 1
Shared TopBar pattern — back arrow navigation, contextual title ('Add Expense' or 'Edit Expense'), consistent with dashboard and spending-insights TopBar
Shared NavigationTabs pattern — bottom tab bar with Home, Add Expense (active), and Insights tabs, consistent across all three main pages
Dropdown calendar pattern — MiniCalendarDropdown anchored to DatePickerInput trigger, elevation level 2, dismissible on outside click
Inline validation pattern — real-time field validation using coral-error (#F87171) border and error text in label typography below input
accessibilityRequirements: WCAG 2.1 AA color contrast ratio of 4.5:1 minimum for all text — silver-text (#CBD5E1) on deep-navy (#0F172A) achieves ~11:1; gold-amber (#F59E0B) on deep-navy achieves ~8.5:1 for CTA text
AmountHeroInput must have a visible label (visually hidden if design requires) and aria-label='Expense amount' with aria-describedby linking to currency indicator
CategoryChipGrid must use role='radiogroup' with aria-label='Select category'; each chip uses role='radio' with aria-checked state reflecting selection
PaymentMethodChipRow must use role='radiogroup' with aria-label='Select payment method'; each chip uses role='radio' with aria-checked state
QuickAddChip elements must have aria-label describing the suggestion content (e.g., 'Quick add: Coffee at Starbucks, $4.50') and role='button'
SaveExpenseButton must have aria-disabled='true' when form is incomplete, with aria-describedby pointing to validation summary
MiniCalendarDropdown must be keyboard navigable — arrow keys move between dates, Enter selects, Escape closes; implements aria-haspopup='dialog' on trigger
DatePickerInput trigger must announce selected date to screen readers via aria-label='Selected date: [date]' updated dynamically
NewCategoryInlineForm expansion must be announced via aria-live='polite' region so screen readers announce the form appearance
ColorPickerRow swatches must have aria-label='Select color: [color name]' and role='radio' within a role='radiogroup' aria-label='Category color'
NoteInput must have associated label element and CharacterCounter linked via aria-describedby; counter announces remaining characters
Focus management: when QuickAddChip is activated and auto-fills form, focus moves to AmountHeroInput for user confirmation
All interactive elements meet minimum touch target of 44x44px per design token specification
TopBar back arrow button must have aria-label='Go back to Dashboard' and be keyboard focusable
NavigationTabs must use role='tablist' with each tab as role='tab' and aria-selected state; active tab (Add Expense) has aria-selected='true'

Form must support keyboard-only navigation in logical tab order: QuickAddSuggestions → AmountHeroInput → CategoryChipGrid → NewCategoryInlineForm (if open) → DatePickerInput → PaymentMethodChipRow → NoteInput → SaveExpenseButton
Error messages for validation failures must use role='alert' or aria-live='assertive' to announce immediately to screen readers
SettingsDialog uses role='dialog' with aria-modal='true' and aria-labelledby pointing to dialog title; focus trapped within dialog when open
dataModelDependencies: Expense entity — fields: id, amount, merchant, category_id, date, payment_method_id, note, currency; used for pre-filling all form fields in edit mode and for create/update submission payload
Category entity — fields: id, name, color_token, color_hex, icon, is_default, sort_order; drives CategoryChipGrid options, NewCategoryInlineForm creation, and ColorPickerRow color selection
PaymentMethod entity — fields: id, name, type, icon, last_four, is_default; drives PaymentMethodChipRow options with default pre-selection

QuickAddSuggestion entity — fields: id, merchant, amount, category_id, payment_method_id, emoji, frequency, last_used_at; drives QuickAddSuggestions chip row (top 4 by frequency/recency via GET /api/suggestions?limit=4)
UserSettings entity — fields: currency, default_monthly_budget, locale; used by TopBar and SettingsDialog for currency display in AmountHeroInput and global formatting
API dependency: GET /api/categories — fetch all categories for CategoryChipGrid on mount
API dependency: GET /api/payment-methods — fetch all payment methods for PaymentMethodChipRow on mount
API dependency: GET /api/suggestions?limit=4 — fetch QuickAddSuggestions on mount
API dependency: GET /api/expenses/:id — fetch existing expense data for edit mode pre-fill when navigated from dashboard Edit action
API dependency: POST /api/expenses — submit new expense on SaveExpenseButton click in create mode
API dependency: PUT /api/expenses/:id — submit updated expense on SaveExpenseButton click in edit mode
API dependency: POST /api/categories — create new custom category from NewCategoryInlineForm submission
API dependency: GET /api/settings — fetch UserSettings for currency display and locale formatting
